science.title: Black ghost knifefish inspires next-generation maneuverable underwater robots
science.description: Researchers have unlocked the secrets behind the extraordinary maneuverability of the black ghost knifefish, a freshwater species known for its effortless forward, backward, and hovering movements. By systematically analyzing the fin’s unique morphology and wave-like motion, the team has established a comprehensive kinematic database that could bridge the gap between biological propulsion and bio-inspired robotic design, potentially revolutionizing underwater vehicle performance in complex environments.
